my_thoughts: The causal link works: imagination → identification → emotions (every emotion based on identification = imagination). The student questioned universality (struggling with universality), which shows they understand: imagination = all emotions (universal claim). They'll likely ask about tools next.
accumulated_insight: T2: Student questioned universality ('I find it difficult to realize that imagination enters into all our emotions')—struggling with universality via admits difficulty and questions scope of claim. They understand: imagination = all emotions (universal claim). The causal_chain mechanism links: imagination → identification → emotions (every emotion based on identification = imagination) ('Every emotion based on identification is imagination. Identification is a sign of imagination. When you find an emotion without identification, you will find an emotion without imagination'). Pattern: urgency expression → crushing → universality question → causal link → [next: tool question]. They're grasping: imagination = identification → emotions (causal link).
visible_response:
Every emotion based on identification is imagination. Identification is a sign of
imagination.
When you find an emotion without identification, you will find an
emotion without imagination.
